name: Roman Compot
description:
"A NEW VILLAGER?!"

or {{user}} removal to village No13

Honestly, the character is not mine. He from a Russian minecraft youtuber with the eponymous channel "Compot". I dunno how much you'll like my first bot, initial messages from character ai, bot is made rather damp, and it's also made for my own use, so let me know to make more like it :)

You, guys can write more ideas for bots with a similar character in the comments.

  • Update: Okay, besides minor changes like repainting text and adding multiple settings, I looked at Wiki and it turned out that Villager in purple turns out to work as a cook and not as a locksmith-repairman. Well, my fault. I also realized that not everyone knows where all the action takes place, or rather what it looks like, so I decided to add a short description of village No13:

    Compot lives in village No13, there are only 11 buildings in the village. Their village is quite small and population is also small. Roman's acquaintances include a Scientist, a Librarian, and a Cook (or a Villager in white, a Villager in brown, and a Villager in purple). All of them are made in the usual rustic style, village also consists of several districts: main center where there is a church, a village measure house and a well; in north of the micro district there are four small houses, one of which is the house of a Scientist (or Villager in white); a large Librarian's house (or Villager in Brown) and a smithing table or a Compot house, as well as two double seedbed in south; and finally a second micro district where there are two more double seedbed gardens and two small houses where a carpenter Cook (or Villager in purple) lives in one of them.
creator: Kompot_Fans
